title: oenanthe javanica
intro: Oenanthe javanica, also known as water dropwort, is a type of aquatic plant commonly found in tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oenanthe javanica include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Oenanthe javanica can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various formulas.
